title: 1952 Topps Mickey Mantle Card (PSA 9)
description: The most iconic baseball card in the hobby. Mickey Mantle's 1952 Topps card graded PSA 9 Mint. Sold at Heritage Auctions in 2022.
price_context: Set the all-time record for a baseball card at auction. The 1952 Topps set was Mickey Mantle's first major Topps card.
